_schema.description: Meeting templates - auto-generated from call outcomes, refined by Ewing

fields.name: Template name (e.g., 'Initial Discovery Call', 'Product Demo')
fields.type: Meeting type (discovery, demo, follow_up, closing, intro, referral)
fields.prep_checklist: What to prepare before this meeting type
fields.follow_up_template: Email template to send after this meeting type

templates.name: Initial Discovery Call
templates.description_template:
Hi {{prospect_first_name}},

Looking forward to connecting. Here's a quick agenda:

1. Quick introductions
2. Learn about {{prospect_company}} and your current approach
3. Share how we might help
4. Discuss next steps if there's mutual fit

Best,
Ewing
agenda: Solution overview relevant to their needs (10 min)
prep_checklist: Prepare 3 relevant case studies or proof points
templates.follow_up_template:
Hi {{prospect_first_name}},

Great speaking with you today. Here's a quick recap:

{{recap_bullets}}

As discussed, our next step is {{next_step}}. I'll {{your_action}} by {{date}}.

Looking forward to it.

Best,
Ewing

templates.name: Product Demo
templates.description_template:
Hi {{prospect_first_name}},

Excited to show you what we've built. Agenda:

1. Quick recap of your goals from our last call
2. Live demo tailored to {{prospect_company}}
3. Q&A
4. Next steps

Please feel free to invite anyone else from your team.

Best,
Ewing
prep_checklist: Customize demo environment for their use case
Confirm all attendees and their roles
templates.follow_up_template:
Hi {{prospect_first_name}},

Thanks for taking the time for the demo today. Here's what we covered:

{{recap_bullets}}

Attached: {{attachments}}

Next step: {{next_step}} by {{date}}.

Best,
Ewing

templates.name: Scheduled Callback
templates.description_template:
Scheduled callback per our conversation on {{original_call_date}}.

Context: {{callback_reason}}
prep_checklist: Prepare answer to their specific question
Have calendar ready to book next meeting if appropriate
